Query:
WITH 
"jobinformation0" AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM "taleo"."jobinformation"
), 
"argroupdescription1" AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM "taleo"."argroupdescription"
), 
"aruser_recrtowneroperno_" AS (
    SELECT *,
	        "aruser"."aruserno" AS "ARUSERNO"

    FROM "taleo"."aruser"
), 
"jobinformationdescription11" AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM "taleo"."jobinformationdescription"
), 
"jobinformationudfreport12" AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM "taleo"."jobinformationudfreport"
), 
"aruser_contactemail_" AS (
    SELECT *,
	        "aruser"."aruserno" AS "ARUSERNO"

    FROM "taleo"."aruser"
), 
"aruser_contactname_" AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM "taleo"."aruser"
), 
"aruser_hiringmgrno_" AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM "taleo"."aruser"
), 
"aruser_recrtasstno_" AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM "taleo"."aruser"
), 
"sq0_main_query" AS (
    SELECT
        "requisition8"."contestnumber" AS "requisition_id", 
        MIN("ps_reqstat_jdo"."req_status") AS "min1", 
        MIN(TRIM(BOTH FROM ((((NVL("aruser_recrtowneroperno_"."lastname", varchar ' ') || varchar ', ') || NVL("aruser_recrtowneroperno_"."firstname", varchar ' ')) || varchar ' ') || NVL("aruser_recrtowneroperno_"."middleinitial", varchar ' ')))) AS "min11", 
        MIN("ps_department_jdo"."departmentname") AS "min12", 
        MIN("ps_reqstat_jdo"."req_status_details") AS "min13", 
        MIN(TRIM(BOTH FROM ((((NVL("aruser_hiringmgrno_"."lastname", varchar ' ') || varchar ', ') || NVL("aruser_hiringmgrno_"."firstname", varchar ' ')) || varchar ' ') || NVL("aruser_hiringmgrno_"."middleinitial", varchar ' ')))) AS "min14", 
        MIN("ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cgps_jobtitle") AS "min15", 
        MIN("ps_candofr_jdo_requisition_"."cgps_jobcode") AS "min16", 
        MIN("ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_psbandreq") AS "min17", 
        MIN("ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_postingtype") AS "min18", 
        MIN((("jobinformationudfreport12"."udscode15" || varchar ' - ') || "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_reqexpensectr")) AS "min19", 
        MIN("ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_business_line") AS "min110", 
        MIN((("ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cgps_eeocateg_code" || varchar ' - ') || "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cgps_eeocateg")) AS "min111", 
        MIN((("ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cgps_eeogroup_code" || varchar ' - ') || "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cgps_eeogroup")) AS "min112", 
        MIN(
            CASE 
                WHEN "argroupdescription1"."locale" = varchar 'en' THEN "argroupdescription1"."namedescription"
            END
        ) AS "min113", 
        MIN("olfjobfielddescopti__requisition_"."name1") AS "min114", 
        MIN("olfjobfielddescopti__requisition_"."name2") AS "min115", 
        MIN(
            CASE 
                WHEN "aruser_recrtasstno_"."lastname" IS NULL THEN NULL
                ELSE TRIM(BOTH FROM ((((NVL("aruser_recrtasstno_"."lastname", varchar ' ') || varchar ', ') || NVL("aruser_recrtasstno_"."firstname", varchar ' ')) || varchar ' ') || NVL("aruser_recrtasstno_"."middleinitial", varchar ' ')))
            END
        ) AS "min116", 
        MIN("ps_cswworkflow_jdo"."cswworkflowname") AS "min117", 
        MIN("ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_employeeclass") AS "min118", 
        MIN(
            CASE 
                WHEN "rsemployeestatusdescription2"."language" = 2 THEN "rsemployeestatusdescription2"."rsemployeestatusdesc"
            END
        ) AS "min119", 
        MIN(
            CASE 
                WHEN "rsjobshiftdescription6"."language" = 2 THEN "rsjobshiftdescription6"."rsjobshiftdesc"
            END
        ) AS "min120", 
        MIN(
            CASE 
                WHEN "rsjobscheduledescription4"."language" = 8 THEN "rsjobscheduledescription4"."rsjobscheduledesc"
            END
        ) AS "min121", 
        MIN("ps_candofr_jdo_requisition_"."cg_standardhrs") AS "min122", 
        MIN("ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_fte") AS "min123", 
        MIN("ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_competency_list") AS "min124", 
        MIN("jobinformationdescription11"."externaldescription") AS "min125", 
        MIN("jobinformationdescription11"."externalqualification") AS "min126", 
        MIN(TRIM(BOTH FROM ((((NVL("aruser_contactname_"."lastname", varchar ' ') || varchar ', ') || NVL("aruser_contactname_"."firstname", varchar ' ')) || varchar ' ') || NVL("aruser_contactname_"."middleinitial", varchar ' ')))) AS "min127", 
        MIN("aruser_contactemail_"."correspondenceemail") AS "min128", 
        MIN("jobinformationdescription11"."internaldescription") AS "min129", 
        MIN("jobinformationdescription11"."internalqualification") AS "min130"
    FROM
        "jobinformation0"
        INNER JOIN "argroupdescription1" ON "jobinformation0"."groupno" = "argroupdescription1"."argroupno"
        INNER JOIN "taleo"."ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo" "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"
            ON "jobinformation0"."jobinformationno" = "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."jobinformationno"
        INNER JOIN "taleo"."rsemployeestatusdescription" "rsemployeestatusdescription2"
            ON "jobinformation0"."employeestatusno" = "rsemployeestatusdescription2"."rsemployeestatusno"
        INNER JOIN "taleo"."rsjobscheduledescription" "rsjobscheduledescription4"
            ON "jobinformation0"."jobscheduleno" = "rsjobscheduledescription4"."rsjobscheduleno"
        INNER JOIN "taleo"."rsjobshiftdescription" "rsjobshiftdescription6"
            ON "jobinformation0"."jobshiftno" = "rsjobshiftdescription6"."rsjobshiftno"
        INNER JOIN "taleo"."requisition" "requisition8"
            ON "requisition8"."jobinformationno" = "jobinformation0"."jobinformationno"
        LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."ps_candofr_jdo" "ps_candofr_jdo_requisition_"
            ON "jobinformation0"."offerno" = "ps_candofr_jdo_requisition_"."offerno"
        LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."olfjobfielddescopti" "olfjobfielddescopti__requisition_"
            ON "requisition8"."olfjobfieldno" = "olfjobfielddescopti__requisition_"."olfjobfieldno"
        LEFT OUTER JOIN "aruser_recrtowneroperno_"
            ON "jobinformation0"."recruiterowneroperatorno" = "aruser_recrtowneroperno_"."ARUSERNO"
        LEFT OUTER JOIN "jobinformationdescription11"
            ON "jobinformation0"."jobinformationno" = "jobinformationdescription11"."jobinformationno"
        LEFT OUTER JOIN "jobinformationudfreport12"
            ON "jobinformation0"."jobinformationno" = "jobinformationudfreport12"."jobinformationno"
        LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."ps_cswworkflow_jdo" "ps_cswworkflow_jdo"
            ON "jobinformation0"."cswworkflowno" = "ps_cswworkflow_jdo"."cswworkflowno"
        LEFT OUTER JOIN "aruser_contactemail_"
            ON "requisition8"."contactemailintno" = "aruser_contactemail_".ARUSERNO
        LEFT OUTER JOIN "aruser_contactname_"
            ON "requisition8"."contactnameintno" = "aruser_contactname_"."aruserno"
        LEFT OUTER JOIN "aruser_hiringmgrno_"
            ON "requisition8"."hiringmanagerno" = "aruser_hiringmgrno_"."aruserno"
        LEFT OUTER JOIN "aruser_recrtasstno_"
            ON "requisition8"."recruiterassistantno" = "aruser_recrtasstno_"."aruserno"
        LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."ps_department_jdo" "ps_department_jdo"
            ON "requisition8"."departmentno" = "ps_department_jdo"."departmentno"
        LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."ps_reqstat_jdo" "ps_reqstat_jdo"
            ON "requisition8"."contestnumber" = "ps_reqstat_jdo"."req_no"
    WHERE 
        "requisition8"."contestnumber" = ?
    GROUP BY 
        "requisition8"."contestnumber"
)

Query:
WITH 
"jobinformation0" AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM "taleo"."jobinformation"
), 
"argroupdescription1" AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM "taleo"."argroupdescription"
), 
"aruser_recrtowneroperno_" AS (
    SELECT *,
	        "aruser"."aruserno" AS "ARUSERNO"

    FROM "taleo"."aruser"
), 
"jobinformationdescription11" AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM "taleo"."jobinformationdescription"
), 
"jobinformationudfreport12" AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM "taleo"."jobinformationudfreport"
), 
"aruser_contactemail_" AS (
    SELECT *,
	        "aruser"."aruserno" AS "ARUSERNO"

    FROM "taleo"."aruser"
), 
"aruser_contactname_" AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM "taleo"."aruser"
), 
"aruser_hiringmgrno_" AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM "taleo"."aruser"
), 
"aruser_recrtasstno_" AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM "taleo"."aruser"
), 
"sq0_main_query" AS (
    SELECT
        "requisition8"."contestnumber" AS "requisition_id", 
        MIN("ps_reqstat_jdo"."req_status") AS "min1", 
        MIN(TRIM(BOTH FROM ((((NVL("aruser_recrtowneroperno_"."lastname", varchar ' ') || varchar ', ') || NVL("aruser_recrtowneroperno_"."firstname", varchar ' ')) || varchar ' ') || NVL("aruser_recrtowneroperno_"."middleinitial", varchar ' ')))) AS "min11", 
        MIN("ps_department_jdo"."departmentname") AS "min12", 
        MIN("ps_reqstat_jdo"."req_status_details") AS "min13", 
        MIN(TRIM(BOTH FROM ((((NVL("aruser_hiringmgrno_"."lastname", varchar ' ') || varchar ', ') || NVL("aruser_hiringmgrno_"."firstname", varchar ' ')) || varchar ' ') || NVL("aruser_hiringmgrno_"."middleinitial", varchar ' ')))) AS "min14", 
        MIN("ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cgps_jobtitle") AS "min15", 
        MIN("ps_candofr_jdo_requisition_"."cgps_jobcode") AS "min16", 
        MIN("ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_psbandreq") AS "min17", 
        MIN("ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_postingtype") AS "min18", 
        MIN((("jobinformationudfreport12"."udscode15" || varchar ' - ') || "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_reqexpensectr")) AS "min19", 
        MIN("ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_business_line") AS "min110", 
        MIN((("ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cgps_eeocateg_code" || varchar ' - ') || "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cgps_eeocateg")) AS "min111", 
        MIN((("ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cgps_eeogroup_code" || varchar ' - ') || "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cgps_eeogroup")) AS "min112", 
        MIN(
            CASE 
                WHEN "argroupdescription1"."locale" = varchar 'en' THEN "argroupdescription1"."namedescription"
            END
        ) AS "min113", 
        MIN("olfjobfielddescopti__requisition_"."name1") AS "min114", 
        MIN("olfjobfielddescopti__requisition_"."name2") AS "min115", 
        MIN(
            CASE 
                WHEN "aruser_recrtasstno_"."lastname" IS NULL THEN NULL
                ELSE TRIM(BOTH FROM ((((NVL("aruser_recrtasstno_"."lastname", varchar ' ') || varchar ', ') || NVL("aruser_recrtasstno_"."firstname", varchar ' ')) || varchar ' ') || NVL("aruser_recrtasstno_"."middleinitial", varchar ' ')))
            END
        ) AS "min116", 
        MIN("ps_cswworkflow_jdo"."cswworkflowname") AS "min117", 
        MIN("ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_employeeclass") AS "min118", 
        MIN(
            CASE 
                WHEN "rsemployeestatusdescription2"."language" = 2 THEN "rsemployeestatusdescription2"."rsemployeestatusdesc"
            END
        ) AS "min119", 
        MIN(
            CASE 
                WHEN "rsjobshiftdescription6"."language" = 2 THEN "rsjobshiftdescription6"."rsjobshiftdesc"
            END
        ) AS "min120", 
        MIN(
            CASE 
                WHEN "rsjobscheduledescription4"."language" = 8 THEN "rsjobscheduledescription4"."rsjobscheduledesc"
            END
        ) AS "min121", 
        MIN("ps_candofr_jdo_requisition_"."cg_standardhrs") AS "min122", 
        MIN("ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_fte") AS "min123", 
        MIN("ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_competency_list") AS "min124", 
        MIN("jobinformationdescription11"."externaldescription") AS "min125", 
        MIN("jobinformationdescription11"."externalqualification") AS "min126", 
        MIN(TRIM(BOTH FROM ((((NVL("aruser_contactname_"."lastname", varchar ' ') || varchar ', ') || NVL("aruser_contactname_"."firstname", varchar ' ')) || varchar ' ') || NVL("aruser_contactname_"."middleinitial", varchar ' ')))) AS "min127", 
        MIN("aruser_contactemail_"."correspondenceemail") AS "min128", 
        MIN("jobinformationdescription11"."internaldescription") AS "min129", 
        MIN("jobinformationdescription11"."internalqualification") AS "min130"
    FROM
        "jobinformation0"
        INNER JOIN "argroupdescription1" ON "jobinformation0"."groupno" = "argroupdescription1"."argroupno"
        INNER JOIN "taleo"."ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo" "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"
            ON "jobinformation0"."jobinformationno" = "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."jobinformationno"
        INNER JOIN "taleo"."rsemployeestatusdescription" "rsemployeestatusdescription2"
            ON "jobinformation0"."employeestatusno" = "rsemployeestatusdescription2"."rsemployeestatusno"
        INNER JOIN "taleo"."rsjobscheduledescription" "rsjobscheduledescription4"
            ON "jobinformation0"."jobscheduleno" = "rsjobscheduledescription4"."rsjobscheduleno"
        INNER JOIN "taleo"."rsjobshiftdescription" "rsjobshiftdescription6"
            ON "jobinformation0"."jobshiftno" = "rsjobshiftdescription6"."rsjobshiftno"
        INNER JOIN "taleo"."requisition" "requisition8"
            ON "requisition8"."jobinformationno" = "jobinformation0"."jobinformationno"
        LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."ps_candofr_jdo" "ps_candofr_jdo_requisition_"
            ON "jobinformation0"."offerno" = "ps_candofr_jdo_requisition_"."offerno"
        LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."olfjobfielddescopti" "olfjobfielddescopti__requisition_"
            ON "requisition8"."olfjobfieldno" = "olfjobfielddescopti__requisition_"."olfjobfieldno"
        LEFT OUTER JOIN "aruser_recrtowneroperno_"
            ON "jobinformation0"."recruiterowneroperatorno" = "aruser_recrtowneroperno_"."ARUSERNO"
        LEFT OUTER JOIN "jobinformationdescription11"
            ON "jobinformation0"."jobinformationno" = "jobinformationdescription11"."jobinformationno"
        LEFT OUTER JOIN "jobinformationudfreport12"
            ON "jobinformation0"."jobinformationno" = "jobinformationudfreport12"."jobinformationno"
        LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."ps_cswworkflow_jdo" "ps_cswworkflow_jdo"
            ON "jobinformation0"."cswworkflowno" = "ps_cswworkflow_jdo"."cswworkflowno"
        LEFT OUTER JOIN "aruser_contactemail_"
            ON "requisition8"."contactemailintno" = "aruser_contactemail_".ARUSERNO
        LEFT OUTER JOIN "aruser_contactname_"
            ON "requisition8"."contactnameintno" = "aruser_contactname_"."aruserno"
        LEFT OUTER JOIN "aruser_hiringmgrno_"
            ON "requisition8"."hiringmanagerno" = "aruser_hiringmgrno_"."aruserno"
        LEFT OUTER JOIN "aruser_recrtasstno_"
            ON "requisition8"."recruiterassistantno" = "aruser_recrtasstno_"."aruserno"
        LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."ps_department_jdo" "ps_department_jdo"
            ON "requisition8"."departmentno" = "ps_department_jdo"."departmentno"
        LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."ps_reqstat_jdo" "ps_reqstat_jdo"
            ON "requisition8"."contestnumber" = "ps_reqstat_jdo"."req_no"
    WHERE 
        "requisition8"."contestnumber" = ?
    GROUP BY 
        "requisition8"."contestnumber"
)
SELECT
    "sq0_main_query"."requisition_id" AS "requisition_id", 
    MIN("sq0_main_query"."min1") OVER(PARTITION BY "sq0_main_query"."requisition_id") AS "req_status", 
    MIN("sq0_main_query"."min11") OVER(PARTITION BY "sq0_main_query"."requisition_id") AS "recruiter_owner_name", 
    MIN("sq0_main_query"."min12") OVER(PARTITION BY "sq0_main_query"."requisition_id") AS "departmentname", 
    MIN("sq0_main_query"."min13") OVER(PARTITION BY "sq0_main_query"."requisition_id") AS "req_status_details",

    MIN("sq0_main_query"."min15") OVER(PARTITION BY "sq0_main_query"."requisition_id") AS "cgps_jobtitle", 
    MIN("sq0_main_query"."min16") OVER(PARTITION BY "sq0_main_query"."requisition_id") AS "cgps_jobcode", 
    MIN("sq0_main_query"."min17") OVER(PARTITION BY "sq0_main_query"."requisition_id") AS "cg_psbandreq", 
    MIN("sq0_main_query"."min18") OVER(PARTITION BY "sq0_main_query"."requisition_id") AS "cg_postingtype", 
    MIN("sq0_main_query"."min19") OVER(PARTITION BY "sq0_main_query"."requisition_id") AS "cg_reqexpensectr", 
    MIN("sq0_main_query"."min110") OVER(PARTITION BY "sq0_main_query"."requisition_id") AS "cg_business_line", 
    MIN("sq0_main_query"."min111") OVER(PARTITION BY "sq0_main_query"."requisition_id") AS "cgps_eeocateg", 
    MIN("sq0_main_query"."min112") OVER(PARTITION BY "sq0_main_query"."requisition_id") AS "cgps_eeogroup", 
    MIN("sq0_main_query"."min113") OVER(PARTITION BY "sq0_main_query"."requisition_id") AS "namedescription", 
    MIN("sq0_main_query"."min114") OVER(PARTITION BY "sq0_main_query"."requisition_id") AS "job_function", 
    MIN("sq0_main_query"."min115") OVER(PARTITION BY "sq0_main_query"."requisition_id") AS "job_family", 
    MIN("sq0_main_query"."min116") OVER(PARTITION BY "sq0_main_query"."requisition_id") AS "recruiter_assistant_name", 
    MIN("sq0_main_query"."min117") OVER(PARTITION BY "sq0_main_query"."requisition_id") AS "candidate_selection_workflow", 
    MIN("sq0_main_query"."min118") OVER(PARTITION BY "sq0_main_query"."requisition_id") AS "cg_employeeclass", 
    MIN("sq0_main_query"."min119") OVER(PARTITION BY "sq0_main_query"."requisition_id") AS "rsemployeestatusdesc", 
    MIN("sq0_main_query"."min120") OVER(PARTITION BY "sq0_main_query"."requisition_id") AS "rsjobshiftdesc", 
    MIN("sq0_main_query"."min121") OVER(PARTITION BY "sq0_main_query"."requisition_id") AS "rsjobscheduledesc", 
    MIN("sq0_main_query"."min122") OVER(PARTITION BY "sq0_main_query"."requisition_id") AS "cg_standardhrs", 
    MIN("sq0_main_query"."min123") OVER(PARTITION BY "sq0_main_query"."requisition_id") AS "cg_fte", 
    MIN("sq0_main_query"."min124") OVER(PARTITION BY "sq0_main_query"."requisition_id") AS "cg_competency_list", 
    MIN("sq0_main_query"."min125") OVER(PARTITION BY "sq0_main_query"."requisition_id") AS "externaldescription", 
    MIN("sq0_main_query"."min126") OVER(PARTITION BY "sq0_main_query"."requisition_id") AS "externalqualification", 
    MIN("sq0_main_query"."min127") OVER(PARTITION BY "sq0_main_query"."requisition_id") AS "contact_name", 
    MIN("sq0_main_query"."min128") OVER(PARTITION BY "sq0_main_query"."requisition_id") AS "contact_email_correspondenceemail", 
    MIN("sq0_main_query"."min129") OVER(PARTITION BY "sq0_main_query"."requisition_id") AS "internaldescription", 
    MIN("sq0_main_query"."min130") OVER(PARTITION BY "sq0_main_query"."requisition_id") AS "internalqualification"
FROM
    "sq0_main_query"
ORDER BY 
    "requisition_id" ASC NULLS LAST;

"SQ0_Questions_Query" AS 
    (
    SELECT
        "D1"."C0" AS "QUESTIONDESC",

    FROM

            "TQ0_Questions_Query"."QUESTIONDESC" AS "C0",

                OVER(
                    PARTITION BY

            "TQ0_Questions_Query"."VISIBILITYFORCANDIDATEDESC" AS "C8"
        FROM

        "D1"."C0",

    )
SELECT

    "SQ0_Questions_Query"."Asset" AS "Asset"
FROM

Query:
WITH 
"JOBINFORMATION2" AS 
    (
    SELECT
        "jobinformation"."jobinformationno" AS "JOBINFORMATIONNO", 
        "jobinformation"."prescreeningformno" AS "PRESCREENINGFORMNO", 
        "jobinformation"."creatoroperatorno" AS "CREATOROPERATORNO", 
        "jobinformation"."recruiterowneroperatorno" AS "RECRUITEROWNEROPERATORNO", 
        "jobinformation"."groupno" AS "GROUPNO", 
        "jobinformation"."structureno" AS "STRUCTURENO", 
        "jobinformation"."jobfieldno" AS "JOBFIELDNO", 
        "jobinformation"."primarylocationno" AS "PRIMARYLOCATIONNO", 
        "jobinformation"."programno" AS "PROGRAMNO", 
        "jobinformation"."willtravelno" AS "WILLTRAVELNO", 
        "jobinformation"."studylevelno" AS "STUDYLEVELNO", 
        "jobinformation"."overtimestatusno" AS "OVERTIMESTATUSNO", 
        "jobinformation"."citizenshipstatusno" AS "CITIZENSHIPSTATUSNO", 
        "jobinformation"."jobtypeno" AS "JOBTYPENO", 
        "jobinformation"."joblevelno" AS "JOBLEVELNO", 
        "jobinformation"."jobscheduleno" AS "JOBSCHEDULENO", 
        "jobinformation"."jobshiftno" AS "JOBSHIFTNO", 
        "jobinformation"."employeestatusno" AS "EMPLOYEESTATUSNO", 
        "jobinformation"."empequityestablishmentno" AS "EMPEQUITYESTABLISHMENTNO", 
        "jobinformation"."budgetrscurrencyno" AS "BUDGETRSCURRENCYNO", 
        "jobinformation"."bonusrscurrencyno" AS "BONUSRSCURRENCYNO", 
        "jobinformation"."offerno" AS "OFFERNO", 
        "jobinformation"."travelcosts" AS "TRAVELCOSTS", 
        "jobinformation"."sourcingbudget" AS "SOURCINGBUDGET", 
        "jobinformation"."relocationcosts" AS "RELOCATIONCOSTS", 
        "jobinformation"."additionalinformation" AS "ADDITIONALINFORMATION", 
        "jobinformation"."othercosts" AS "OTHERCOSTS", 
        "jobinformation"."internalbonus" AS "INTERNALBONUS", 
        "jobinformation"."internalbonusamount" AS "INTERNALBONUSAMOUNT", 
        "jobinformation"."externalbonus" AS "EXTERNALBONUS", 
        "jobinformation"."externalbonusamount" AS "EXTERNALBONUSAMOUNT", 
        "jobinformation"."jobgrade" AS "JOBGRADE", 
        "jobinformation"."midpointsalary" AS "MIDPOINTSALARY", 
        "jobinformation"."highquartilesalary" AS "HIGHQUARTILESALARY", 
        "jobinformation"."lowquartilesalary" AS "LOWQUARTILESALARY", 
        "jobinformation"."hiretypeno" AS "HIRETYPENO", 
        "jobinformation"."lastmodifieddate" AS "LASTMODIFIEDDATE", 
        "jobinformation"."creationdate" AS "CREATIONDATE", 
        "jobinformation"."isautorejectcancelled" AS "ISAUTOREJECTCANCELLED", 
        "jobinformation"."autodeclinecandidates" AS "AUTODECLINECANDIDATES", 
        "jobinformation"."metaprescreeningformno" AS "METAPRESCREENINGFORMNO", 
        "jobinformation"."contingentcurrencyno" AS "CONTINGENTCURRENCYNO", 
        "jobinformation"."requestedbillrate" AS "REQUESTEDBILLRATE", 
        "jobinformation"."estimatedexpense" AS "ESTIMATEDEXPENSE", 
        "jobinformation"."isexpensereimbursable" AS "ISEXPENSEREIMBURSABLE", 
        "jobinformation"."estimatedlaborcost" AS "ESTIMATEDLABORCOST", 
        "jobinformation"."estimatedtotalbudget" AS "ESTIMATEDTOTALBUDGET", 
        "jobinformation"."searchvalue_int" AS "SEARCHVALUE_INT", 
        "jobinformation"."searchvalue_ext" AS "SEARCHVALUE_EXT", 
        "jobinformation"."jobroleno" AS "JOBROLENO", 
        "jobinformation"."billratemedian" AS "BILLRATEMEDIAN", 
        "jobinformation"."billratenottoexceed" AS "BILLRATENOTTOEXCEED", 
        "jobinformation"."creationflowtypedimensionno" AS "CREATIONFLOWTYPEDIMENSIONNO", 
        "jobinformation"."nbtohire" AS "NBTOHIRE", 
        "jobinformation"."unlimitedhire" AS "UNLIMITEDHIRE", 
        "jobinformation"."validityperiodenabled" AS "VALIDITYPERIODENABLED", 
        "jobinformation"."validityperiod" AS "VALIDITYPERIOD", 
        "jobinformation"."cswworkflowno" AS "CSWWORKFLOWNO", 
        "jobinformation"."autopoolingenabled" AS "AUTOPOOLINGENABLED", 
        "jobinformation"."rcautopoolingcriteriano" AS "RCAUTOPOOLINGCRITERIANO", 
        "jobinformation"."isautorejectfilled" AS "ISAUTOREJECTFILLED"
    FROM
        "taleo"."jobinformation"
    ), 
"QUESTIONDESCRIPTION__POSSIBLEANSWER_9" AS 
    (
    SELECT
        "questiondescription"."questionno" AS "QUESTIONNO", 
        "questiondescription"."questiondesc" AS "QUESTIONDESC"
    FROM
        "taleo"."questiondescription" "questiondescription" 
    WHERE 
        "questiondescription"."locale" = varchar 'en'
    ), 
"VISIBILITYFORCANDIDATEDESC12" AS 
    (
    SELECT
        "visibilityforcandidatedesc"."visibilityforcandidateno" AS "VISIBILITYFORCANDIDATENO", 
        "visibilityforcandidatedesc"."visibilityforcandidatedesc" AS "VISIBILITYFORCANDIDATEDESC"
    FROM
        "taleo"."visibilityforcandidatedesc" "visibilityforcandidatedesc" 
    WHERE 
        "visibilityforcandidatedesc"."locale" = varchar 'en'
    ), 
"QUESTIONSCOPEDESCRIPTION15" AS 
    (
    SELECT
        "questionscopedescription"."questionscopeno" AS "QUESTIONSCOPENO", 
        "questionscopedescription"."language" AS "LANGUAGE", 
        "questionscopedescription"."questionscopedesc" AS "QUESTIONSCOPEDESC", 
        "questionscopedescription"."locale" AS "LOCALE"
    FROM
        "taleo"."questionscopedescription" "questionscopedescription" 
    WHERE 
        "questionscopedescription"."language" = 2
    ), 
"FORMATOFQUESTIONDESCRIPTION17" AS 
    (
    SELECT
        "formatofquestiondescription"."formatofquestionno" AS "FORMATOFQUESTIONNO", 
        "formatofquestiondescription"."formatofquestiondesc" AS "FORMATOFQUESTIONDESC"
    FROM
        "taleo"."formatofquestiondescription" 
    WHERE 
        "formatofquestiondescription"."locale" = varchar 'en'
    ), 
"POSSIBLEANSWERDESCRIPTION21" AS 
    (
    SELECT
        "possibleanswerdescription"."possibleanswerno" AS "POSSIBLEANSWERNO", 
        "possibleanswerdescription"."possibleanswer" AS "POSSIBLEANSWER"
    FROM
        "taleo"."possibleanswerdescription" "possibleanswerdescription" 
    WHERE 
        "possibleanswerdescription"."locale" = varchar 'en'
    ), 
"TQ0_Questions_Query" AS 
    (
    SELECT
        "QUESTIONDESCRIPTION__POSSIBLEANSWER_9"."QUESTIONDESC" AS "QUESTIONDESC", 
        "POSSIBLEANSWERDESCRIPTION21"."POSSIBLEANSWER" AS "POSSIBLEANSWER", 
        CASE 
            WHEN 
                CASE "PRESCREENINGFORMPOSSIBLEANSWER5"."isrequired"
                    WHEN 0 THEN varchar 'No'
                    WHEN 1 THEN varchar 'Yes'
                END = varchar 'No'
                THEN
                    varchar '--'
            WHEN 
                CASE "PRESCREENINGFORMPOSSIBLEANSWER5"."isrequired"
                    WHEN 0 THEN varchar 'No'
                    WHEN 1 THEN varchar 'Yes'
                END = varchar 'Yes'
                THEN
                    varchar 'Required'
        END AS "ISREQUIRED", 
        CASE 
            WHEN 
                CASE "PRESCREENINGFORMPOSSIBLEANSWER5"."isasset"
                    WHEN 0 THEN varchar 'No'
                    WHEN 1 THEN varchar 'Yes'
                END = varchar 'No'
                THEN
                    varchar '--'
            WHEN 
                CASE "PRESCREENINGFORMPOSSIBLEANSWER5"."isasset"
                    WHEN 0 THEN varchar 'No'
                    WHEN 1 THEN varchar 'Yes'
                END = varchar 'Yes'
                THEN
                    varchar 'Asset'
        END AS "Asset", 
        COUNT("QUESTIONDESCRIPTION__POSSIBLEANSWER_9"."QUESTIONDESC")
            OVER(
                PARTITION BY
                    "QUESTIONDESCRIPTION__POSSIBLEANSWER_9"."QUESTIONDESC", 
                    "POSSIBLEANSWERDESCRIPTION21"."POSSIBLEANSWER", 
                    CASE 
                        WHEN 
                            CASE "PRESCREENINGFORMPOSSIBLEANSWER5"."isrequired"
                                WHEN 0 THEN varchar 'No'
                                WHEN 1 THEN varchar 'Yes'
                            END = varchar 'No'
                            THEN
                                varchar '--'
                        WHEN 
                            CASE "PRESCREENINGFORMPOSSIBLEANSWER5"."isrequired"
                                WHEN 0 THEN varchar 'No'
                                WHEN 1 THEN varchar 'Yes'
                            END = varchar 'Yes'
                            THEN
                                varchar 'Required'
                    END, 
                    CASE 
                        WHEN 
                            CASE "PRESCREENINGFORMPOSSIBLEANSWER5"."isasset"
                                WHEN 0 THEN varchar 'No'
                                WHEN 1 THEN varchar 'Yes'
                            END = varchar 'No'
                            THEN
                                varchar '--'
                        WHEN 
                            CASE "PRESCREENINGFORMPOSSIBLEANSWER5"."isasset"
                                WHEN 0 THEN varchar 'No'
                                WHEN 1 THEN varchar 'Yes'
                            END = varchar 'Yes'
                            THEN
                                varchar 'Asset'
                    END
                ORDER BY
                    "QUESTIONDESCRIPTION__POSSIBLEANSWER_9"."QUESTIONDESC" ASC, 
                    "POSSIBLEANSWERDESCRIPTION21"."POSSIBLEANSWER" ASC, 
                    CASE 
                        WHEN 
                            CASE "PRESCREENINGFORMPOSSIBLEANSWER5"."isrequired"
                                WHEN 0 THEN varchar 'No'
                                WHEN 1 THEN varchar 'Yes'
                            END = varchar 'No'
                            THEN
                                varchar '--'
                        WHEN 
                            CASE "PRESCREENINGFORMPOSSIBLEANSWER5"."isrequired"
                                WHEN 0 THEN varchar 'No'
                                WHEN 1 THEN varchar 'Yes'
                            END = varchar 'Yes'
                            THEN
                                varchar 'Required'
                    END ASC, 
                    CASE 
                        WHEN 
                            CASE "PRESCREENINGFORMPOSSIBLEANSWER5"."isasset"
                                WHEN 0 THEN varchar 'No'
                                WHEN 1 THEN varchar 'Yes'
                            END = varchar 'No'
                            THEN
                                varchar '--'
                        WHEN 
                            CASE "PRESCREENINGFORMPOSSIBLEANSWER5"."isasset"
                                WHEN 0 THEN varchar 'No'
                                WHEN 1 THEN varchar 'Yes'
                            END = varchar 'Yes'
                            THEN
                                varchar 'Asset'
                    END ASC
             ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
            ) AS "Row_Number0", 
        "QUESTIONSCOPEDESCRIPTION15"."QUESTIONSCOPEDESC" AS "QUESTIONSCOPEDESC", 
        "QUESTION7"."code" AS "CODE", 
        "FORMATOFQUESTIONDESCRIPTION17"."FORMATOFQUESTIONDESC" AS "FORMATOFQUESTIONDESC", 
        "VISIBILITYFORCANDIDATEDESC12"."VISIBILITYFORCANDIDATEDESC" AS "VISIBILITYFORCANDIDATEDESC"
    FROM
        "taleo"."requisition" "REQUISITION0"
            INNER JOIN "JOBINFORMATION2"
            ON "REQUISITION0"."jobinformationno" = "JOBINFORMATION2"."JOBINFORMATIONNO"
                LEFT OUTER JOIN 
                "taleo"."prescreeningformquestion" "PRESCREENINGFORMQUESTION3"
                    INNER JOIN "taleo"."prescreeningformpossibleanswer" "PRESCREENINGFORMPOSSIBLEANSWER5"
                    ON "PRESCREENINGFORMQUESTION3"."prescreeningformquestionno" = "PRESCREENINGFORMPOSSIBLEANSWER5"."prescreeningformquestionno"
                        INNER JOIN "taleo"."question" "QUESTION7"
                        ON "QUESTION7"."questionno" = "PRESCREENINGFORMQUESTION3"."questionno"
                            INNER JOIN "QUESTIONDESCRIPTION__POSSIBLEANSWER_9"
                            ON "QUESTION7"."questionno" = "QUESTIONDESCRIPTION__POSSIBLEANSWER_9"."QUESTIONNO"
                                INNER JOIN "VISIBILITYFORCANDIDATEDESC12"
                                ON "QUESTION7"."visibilityforcandidateno" = "VISIBILITYFORCANDIDATEDESC12"."VISIBILITYFORCANDIDATENO"
                                    INNER JOIN "QUESTIONSCOPEDESCRIPTION15"
                                    ON "QUESTIONSCOPEDESCRIPTION15"."QUESTIONSCOPENO" = "QUESTION7"."questionscopeno"
                                        INNER JOIN "FORMATOFQUESTIONDESCRIPTION17"
                                        ON "QUESTION7"."formatofquestionno" = "FORMATOFQUESTIONDESCRIPTION17"."FORMATOFQUESTIONNO"
                ON "JOBINFORMATION2"."PRESCREENINGFORMNO" = "PRESCREENINGFORMQUESTION3"."prescreeningformno"
                    FULL OUTER JOIN "taleo"."answer" "ANSWER19"
                    ON "ANSWER19"."questionno" = "QUESTION7"."questionno"
                        LEFT OUTER JOIN "POSSIBLEANSWERDESCRIPTION21"
                        ON "ANSWER19"."possibleanswerno" = "POSSIBLEANSWERDESCRIPTION21"."POSSIBLEANSWERNO" 
    WHERE 
        "REQUISITION0"."contestnumber" = ? AND
        NOT ( "JOBINFORMATION2"."JOBINFORMATIONNO" IS NULL ) AND
        NOT ( "QUESTIONDESCRIPTION__POSSIBLEANSWER_9"."QUESTIONDESC" IS NULL )
    ), 
"SQ0_Questions_Query" AS 
    (
    SELECT
        "D1"."C0" AS "QUESTIONDESC", 
        "D1"."C1" AS "Row_Number0", 
        "D1"."C2" AS "POSSIBLEANSWER", 
        "D1"."C3" AS "ISREQUIRED", 
        "D1"."C4" AS "Asset", 
        MIN("D1"."C5") AS "Min1", 
        MIN("D1"."C6") AS "Min11", 
        MIN("D1"."C7") AS "Min12", 
        MIN("D1"."C8") AS "Min13"
    FROM
        (
        SELECT
            "TQ0_Questions_Query"."QUESTIONDESC" AS "C0", 
            MIN("TQ0_Questions_Query"."Row_Number0")
                OVER(
                    PARTITION BY
                        "TQ0_Questions_Query"."QUESTIONDESC", 
                        "TQ0_Questions_Query"."POSSIBLEANSWER", 
                        "TQ0_Questions_Query"."ISREQUIRED", 
                        "TQ0_Questions_Query"."Asset"
                ) AS "C1", 
            "TQ0_Questions_Query"."POSSIBLEANSWER" AS "C2", 
            "TQ0_Questions_Query"."ISREQUIRED" AS "C3", 
            "TQ0_Questions_Query"."Asset" AS "C4", 
            "TQ0_Questions_Query"."QUESTIONSCOPEDESC" AS "C5", 
            "TQ0_Questions_Query"."CODE" AS "C6", 
            "TQ0_Questions_Query"."FORMATOFQUESTIONDESC" AS "C7", 
            "TQ0_Questions_Query"."VISIBILITYFORCANDIDATEDESC" AS "C8"
        FROM
            "TQ0_Questions_Query"
        ) "D1" 
    GROUP BY 
        "D1"."C0", 
        "D1"."C1", 
        "D1"."C2", 
        "D1"."C3", 
        "D1"."C4"
    )
SELECT
    "SQ0_Questions_Query"."QUESTIONDESC" AS "QUESTIONDESC", 
    "SQ0_Questions_Query"."Row_Number0" AS "Row_Number0", 
    MIN("SQ0_Questions_Query"."Min1")
        OVER(
            PARTITION BY
                "SQ0_Questions_Query"."QUESTIONDESC"
        ) AS "QUESTIONSCOPEDESC", 
    MIN("SQ0_Questions_Query"."Min11")
        OVER(
            PARTITION BY
                "SQ0_Questions_Query"."QUESTIONDESC"
        ) AS "CODE", 
    MIN("SQ0_Questions_Query"."Min12")
        OVER(
            PARTITION BY
                "SQ0_Questions_Query"."QUESTIONDESC"
        ) AS "FORMATOFQUESTIONDESC", 
    MIN("SQ0_Questions_Query"."Min13")
        OVER(
            PARTITION BY
                "SQ0_Questions_Query"."QUESTIONDESC"
        ) AS "VISIBILITYFORCANDIDATEDESC", 
    "SQ0_Questions_Query"."POSSIBLEANSWER" AS "POSSIBLEANSWER", 
    "SQ0_Questions_Query"."ISREQUIRED" AS "ISREQUIRED", 
    "SQ0_Questions_Query"."Asset" AS "Asset"
FROM
    "SQ0_Questions_Query" 
ORDER BY 
    "QUESTIONDESC" ASC NULLS LAST, 
    "POSSIBLEANSWER" ASC NULLS LAST, 
    "ISREQUIRED" ASC NULLS LAST, 
    "Asset" ASC NULLS LAST

"TQ0_Questions_Query" AS 
    (
    SELECT
        "QUESTIONDESCRIPTION__POSSIBLEANSWER_9"."QUESTIONDESC" AS "QUESTIONDESC", 
        "POSSIBLEANSWERDESCRIPTION21"."POSSIBLEANSWER" AS "POSSIBLEANSWER", 
        CASE 
            WHEN 
                CASE "PRESCREENINGFORMPOSSIBLEANSWER5"."isrequired"
                    WHEN 0 THEN varchar 'No'
                    WHEN 1 THEN varchar 'Yes'
                END = varchar 'No'
                THEN
                    varchar '--'
            WHEN 
                CASE "PRESCREENINGFORMPOSSIBLEANSWER5"."isrequired"
                    WHEN 0 THEN varchar 'No'
                    WHEN 1 THEN varchar 'Yes'
                END = varchar 'Yes'
                THEN
                    varchar 'Required'
        END AS "ISREQUIRED", 
        CASE 
            WHEN 
                CASE "PRESCREENINGFORMPOSSIBLEANSWER5"."isasset"
                    WHEN 0 THEN varchar 'No'
                    WHEN 1 THEN varchar 'Yes'
                END = varchar 'No'

                    varchar '--'
            WHEN 
                CASE "PRESCREENINGFORMPOSSIBLEANSWER5"."isasset"
                    WHEN 0 THEN varchar 'No'
                    WHEN 1 THEN varchar 'Yes'
                END = varchar 'Yes'
                THEN
                    varchar 'Asset'
        END AS "Asset", 
        COUNT("QUESTIONDESCRIPTION__POSSIBLEANSWER_9"."QUESTIONDESC")
            OVER(
                PARTITION BY
                    "QUESTIONDESCRIPTION__POSSIBLEANSWER_9"."QUESTIONDESC", 
                    "POSSIBLEANSWERDESCRIPTION21"."POSSIBLEANSWER", 
                    CASE 
                        WHEN 
                            CASE "PRESCREENINGFORMPOSSIBLEANSWER5"."isrequired"
                                WHEN 0 THEN varchar 'No'
                                WHEN 1 THEN varchar 'Yes'
                            END = varchar 'No'
                            THEN
                                varchar '--'
                        WHEN 
                            CASE "PRESCREENINGFORMPOSSIBLEANSWER5"."isrequired"
                                WHEN 0 THEN varchar 'No'
                                WHEN 1 THEN varchar 'Yes'
                            END = varchar 'Yes'
                            THEN
                                varchar 'Required'
                    END, 
                    CASE 
                        WHEN 
                            CASE "PRESCREENINGFORMPOSSIBLEANSWER5"."isasset"
                                WHEN 0 THEN varchar 'No'
                                WHEN 1 THEN varchar 'Yes'
                            END = varchar 'No'
                            THEN

                        WHEN

                                WHEN 0 THEN varchar 'No'
                                WHEN 1 THEN varchar 'Yes'
                            END = varchar 'Yes'
                            THEN

                    END
                ORDER BY
                    "QUESTIONDESCRIPTION__POSSIBLEANSWER_9"."QUESTIONDESC" ASC, 
                    "POSSIBLEANSWERDESCRIPTION21"."POSSIBLEANSWER" ASC, 
                    CASE 
                        WHEN

                            END = varchar 'No'
                            THEN

                                WHEN 0 THEN varchar 'No'

                            END = varchar 'Yes'
                            THEN

                            END = varchar 'No'

                                WHEN 0 THEN varchar 'No'
                                WHEN 1 THEN varchar 'Yes'
                            END = varchar 'Yes'
                            THEN

             ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
            ) AS "Row_Number0",

                        INNER JOIN "taleo"."question" "QUESTION7"

                            INNER JOIN "QUESTIONDESCRIPTION__POSSIBLEANSWER_9"

    WHERE 
        "REQUISITION0"."contestnumber" = ? AND
        NOT ( "JOBINFORMATION2"."JOBINFORMATIONNO" IS NULL ) AND
        NOT ( "QUESTIONDESCRIPTION__POSSIBLEANSWER_9"."QUESTIONDESC" IS NULL )
    ), 
"SQ0_Questions_Query" AS 
    (
    SELECT
        "D1"."C0" AS "QUESTIONDESC", 
        "D1"."C1" AS "Row_Number0", 
        "D1"."C2" AS "POSSIBLEANSWER", 
        "D1"."C3" AS "ISREQUIRED", 
        "D1"."C4" AS "Asset", 
        MIN("D1"."C5") AS "Min1", 
        MIN("D1"."C6") AS "Min11", 
        MIN("D1"."C7") AS "Min12", 
        MIN("D1"."C8") AS "Min13"
    FROM
        (
        SELECT
            "TQ0_Questions_Query"."QUESTIONDESC" AS "C0", 
            MIN("TQ0_Questions_Query"."Row_Number0")
                OVER(
                    PARTITION BY
                        "TQ0_Questions_Query"."QUESTIONDESC", 
                        "TQ0_Questions_Query"."POSSIBLEANSWER", 
                        "TQ0_Questions_Query"."ISREQUIRED", 
                        "TQ0_Questions_Query"."Asset"
                ) AS "C1", 
            "TQ0_Questions_Query"."POSSIBLEANSWER" AS "C2", 
            "TQ0_Questions_Query"."ISREQUIRED" AS "C3", 
            "TQ0_Questions_Query"."Asset" AS "C4", 
            "TQ0_Questions_Query"."QUESTIONSCOPEDESC" AS "C5", 
            "TQ0_Questions_Query"."CODE" AS "C6", 
            "TQ0_Questions_Query"."FORMATOFQUESTIONDESC" AS "C7", 
            "TQ0_Questions_Query"."VISIBILITYFORCANDIDATEDESC" AS "C8"
        FROM
            "TQ0_Questions_Query"
        ) "D1" 
    GROUP BY 
        "D1"."C0", 
        "D1"."C1", 
        "D1"."C2", 
        "D1"."C3", 
        "D1"."C4"
    )
SELECT
    "SQ0_Questions_Query"."QUESTIONDESC" AS "QUESTIONDESC", 
    "SQ0_Questions_Query"."Row_Number0" AS "Row_Number0", 
    MIN("SQ0_Questions_Query"."Min1")
        OVER(
            PARTITION BY
                "SQ0_Questions_Query"."QUESTIONDESC"
        ) AS "QUESTIONSCOPEDESC", 
    MIN("SQ0_Questions_Query"."Min11")
        OVER(
            PARTITION BY
                "SQ0_Questions_Query"."QUESTIONDESC"
        ) AS "CODE", 
    MIN("SQ0_Questions_Query"."Min12")
        OVER(
            PARTITION BY
                "SQ0_Questions_Query"."QUESTIONDESC"
        ) AS "FORMATOFQUESTIONDESC", 
    MIN("SQ0_Questions_Query"."Min13")
        OVER(
            PARTITION BY
                "SQ0_Questions_Query"."QUESTIONDESC"
        ) AS "VISIBILITYFORCANDIDATEDESC", 
    "SQ0_Questions_Query"."POSSIBLEANSWER" AS "POSSIBLEANSWER", 
    "SQ0_Questions_Query"."ISREQUIRED" AS "ISREQUIRED", 
    "SQ0_Questions_Query"."Asset" AS "Asset"
FROM
    "SQ0_Questions_Query" 
ORDER BY 
    "QUESTIONDESC" ASC NULLS LAST, 
    "POSSIBLEANSWER" ASC NULLS LAST, 
    "ISREQUIRED" ASC NULLS LAST, 
    "Asset" ASC NULLS LAST

"TQ0_Questions_Query" AS 
    (
    SELECT
        "QUESTIONDESCRIPTION__POSSIBLEANSWER_9"."QUESTIONDESC" AS "QUESTIONDESC", 
        "POSSIBLEANSWERDESCRIPTION21"."POSSIBLEANSWER" AS "POSSIBLEANSWER", 
        CASE 
            WHEN 
                CASE "PRESCREENINGFORMPOSSIBLEANSWER5"."isrequired"
                    WHEN 0 THEN varchar 'No'
                    WHEN 1 THEN varchar 'Yes'
                END = varchar 'No'
                THEN

            WHEN

                    WHEN 1 THEN varchar 'Yes'
                END = varchar 'Yes'
                THEN

        END AS "ISREQUIRED", 
        CASE 
            WHEN

                    WHEN 0 THEN varchar 'No'

            WHEN

                    WHEN 0 THEN varchar 'No'
                    WHEN 1 THEN varchar 'Yes'
                END = varchar 'Yes'
                THEN

        END AS "Asset", 
        COUNT("QUESTIONDESCRIPTION__POSSIBLEANSWER_9"."QUESTIONDESC")
            OVER(
                PARTITION BY
                    "QUESTIONDESCRIPTION__POSSIBLEANSWER_9"."QUESTIONDESC", 
                    "POSSIBLEANSWERDESCRIPTION21"."POSSIBLEANSWER",

                            THEN

                    END,

                        WHEN

                                WHEN 0 THEN varchar 'No'
                                WHEN 1 THEN varchar 'Yes'
                            END = varchar 'No'
                            THEN

                        WHEN

                                WHEN 0 THEN varchar 'No'
                                WHEN 1 THEN varchar 'Yes'
                            END = varchar 'Yes'
                            THEN

                    END
                ORDER BY
                    "QUESTIONDESCRIPTION__POSSIBLEANSWER_9"."QUESTIONDESC" ASC, 
                    "POSSIBLEANSWERDESCRIPTION21"."POSSIBLEANSWER" ASC, 
                    CASE 
                        WHEN 
                            CASE "PRESCREENINGFORMPOSSIBLEANSWER5"."isrequired"
                                WHEN 0 THEN varchar 'No'
                                WHEN 1 THEN varchar 'Yes'
                            END = varchar 'No'
                            THEN

                        WHEN

                                WHEN 0 THEN varchar 'No'
                                WHEN 1 THEN varchar 'Yes'
                            END = varchar 'Yes'
                            THEN
                                varchar 'Required'
                    END ASC, 
                    CASE 
                        WHEN 
                            CASE "PRESCREENINGFORMPOSSIBLEANSWER5"."isasset"
                                WHEN 0 THEN varchar 'No'
                                WHEN 1 THEN varchar 'Yes'
                            END = varchar 'No'
                            THEN
                                varchar '--'
                        WHEN 
                            CASE "PRESCREENINGFORMPOSSIBLEANSWER5"."isasset"
                                WHEN 0 THEN varchar 'No'
                                WHEN 1 THEN varchar 'Yes'
                            END = varchar 'Yes'
                            THEN
                                varchar 'Asset'
                    END ASC
             ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
            ) AS "Row_Number0", 
        "QUESTIONSCOPEDESCRIPTION15"."QUESTIONSCOPEDESC" AS "QUESTIONSCOPEDESC", 
        "QUESTION7"."code" AS "CODE", 
        "FORMATOFQUESTIONDESCRIPTION17"."FORMATOFQUESTIONDESC" AS "FORMATOFQUESTIONDESC", 
        "VISIBILITYFORCANDIDATEDESC12"."VISIBILITYFORCANDIDATEDESC" AS "VISIBILITYFORCANDIDATEDESC"

            INNER JOIN "JOBINFORMATION2"
            ON "REQUISITION0"."jobinformationno" = "JOBINFORMATION2"."JOBINFORMATIONNO"
                LEFT OUTER JOIN 
                "taleo"."prescreeningformquestion" "PRESCREENINGFORMQUESTION3"
                    INNER JOIN "taleo"."prescreeningformpossibleanswer" "PRESCREENINGFORMPOSSIBLEANSWER5"
                    ON "PRESCREENINGFORMQUESTION3"."prescreeningformquestionno" = "PRESCREENINGFORMPOSSIBLEANSWER5"."prescreeningformquestionno"
                        INNER JOIN "taleo"."question" "QUESTION7"
                        ON "QUESTION7"."questionno" = "PRESCREENINGFORMQUESTION3"."questionno"
                            INNER JOIN "QUESTIONDESCRIPTION__POSSIBLEANSWER_9"
                            ON "QUESTION7"."questionno" = "QUESTIONDESCRIPTION__POSSIBLEANSWER_9"."QUESTIONNO"
                                INNER JOIN "VISIBILITYFORCANDIDATEDESC12"
                                ON "QUESTION7"."visibilityforcandidateno" = "VISIBILITYFORCANDIDATEDESC12"."VISIBILITYFORCANDIDATENO"
                                    INNER JOIN "QUESTIONSCOPEDESCRIPTION15"

                                        INNER JOIN "FORMATOFQUESTIONDESCRIPTION17"
                                        ON "QUESTION7"."formatofquestionno" = "FORMATOFQUESTIONDESCRIPTION17"."FORMATOFQUESTIONNO"
                ON "JOBINFORMATION2"."PRESCREENINGFORMNO" = "PRESCREENINGFORMQUESTION3"."prescreeningformno"
                    FULL OUTER JOIN "taleo"."answer" "ANSWER19"
                    ON "ANSWER19"."questionno" = "QUESTION7"."questionno"
                        LEFT OUTER JOIN "POSSIBLEANSWERDESCRIPTION21"
                        ON "ANSWER19"."possibleanswerno" = "POSSIBLEANSWERDESCRIPTION21"."POSSIBLEANSWERNO" 
    WHERE 
        "REQUISITION0"."contestnumber" = ? AND
        NOT ( "JOBINFORMATION2"."JOBINFORMATIONNO" IS NULL ) AND
        NOT ( "QUESTIONDESCRIPTION__POSSIBLEANSWER_9"."QUESTIONDESC" IS NULL )
    ), 
"SQ0_Questions_Query" AS 
    (
    SELECT
        "D1"."C0" AS "QUESTIONDESC", 
        "D1"."C1" AS "Row_Number0", 
        "D1"."C2" AS "POSSIBLEANSWER", 
        "D1"."C3" AS "ISREQUIRED", 
        "D1"."C4" AS "Asset", 
        MIN("D1"."C5") AS "Min1", 
        MIN("D1"."C6") AS "Min11", 
        MIN("D1"."C7") AS "Min12", 
        MIN("D1"."C8") AS "Min13"
    FROM
        (
        SELECT
            "TQ0_Questions_Query"."QUESTIONDESC" AS "C0", 
            MIN("TQ0_Questions_Query"."Row_Number0")
                OVER(
                    PARTITION BY
                        "TQ0_Questions_Query"."QUESTIONDESC", 
                        "TQ0_Questions_Query"."POSSIBLEANSWER", 
                        "TQ0_Questions_Query"."ISREQUIRED", 
                        "TQ0_Questions_Query"."Asset"
                ) AS "C1", 
            "TQ0_Questions_Query"."POSSIBLEANSWER" AS "C2", 
            "TQ0_Questions_Query"."ISREQUIRED" AS "C3", 
            "TQ0_Questions_Query"."Asset" AS "C4", 
            "TQ0_Questions_Query"."QUESTIONSCOPEDESC" AS "C5", 
            "TQ0_Questions_Query"."CODE" AS "C6", 
            "TQ0_Questions_Query"."FORMATOFQUESTIONDESC" AS "C7", 
            "TQ0_Questions_Query"."VISIBILITYFORCANDIDATEDESC" AS "C8"
        FROM
            "TQ0_Questions_Query"
        ) "D1" 
    GROUP BY 
        "D1"."C0", 
        "D1"."C1", 
        "D1"."C2", 
        "D1"."C3", 
        "D1"."C4"
    )
SELECT
    "SQ0_Questions_Query"."QUESTIONDESC" AS "QUESTIONDESC", 
    "SQ0_Questions_Query"."Row_Number0" AS "Row_Number0", 
    MIN("SQ0_Questions_Query"."Min1")
        OVER(
            PARTITION BY
                "SQ0_Questions_Query"."QUESTIONDESC"
        ) AS "QUESTIONSCOPEDESC", 
    MIN("SQ0_Questions_Query"."Min11")
        OVER(
            PARTITION BY
                "SQ0_Questions_Query"."QUESTIONDESC"
        ) AS "CODE", 
    MIN("SQ0_Questions_Query"."Min12")
        OVER(
            PARTITION BY
                "SQ0_Questions_Query"."QUESTIONDESC"
        ) AS "FORMATOFQUESTIONDESC", 
    MIN("SQ0_Questions_Query"."Min13")
        OVER(
            PARTITION BY
                "SQ0_Questions_Query"."QUESTIONDESC"
        ) AS "VISIBILITYFORCANDIDATEDESC", 
    "SQ0_Questions_Query"."POSSIBLEANSWER" AS "POSSIBLEANSWER", 
    "SQ0_Questions_Query"."ISREQUIRED" AS "ISREQUIRED", 
    "SQ0_Questions_Query"."Asset" AS "Asset"
FROM
    "SQ0_Questions_Query" 
ORDER BY 
    "QUESTIONDESC" ASC NULLS LAST, 
    "POSSIBLEANSWER" ASC NULLS LAST, 
    "ISREQUIRED" ASC NULLS LAST, 
    "Asset" ASC NULLS LAST

            "TQ0_Questions_Query"."QUESTIONSCOPEDESC" AS "C5", 
            "TQ0_Questions_Query"."CODE" AS "C6",

        FROM

Query:
WITH 
"JOBINFORMATION2" AS 
    (
    SELECT

"QUESTIONDESCRIPTION__POSSIBLEANSWER_9" AS 
    (

        "questiondescription"."questionno" AS "QUESTIONNO", 
        "questiondescription"."questiondesc" AS "QUESTIONDESC"
    FROM
        "taleo"."questiondescription" "questiondescription" 
    WHERE 
        "questiondescription"."locale" = varchar 'en'
    ), 
"VISIBILITYFORCANDIDATEDESC12" AS 
    (
    SELECT
        "visibilityforcandidatedesc"."visibilityforcandidateno" AS "VISIBILITYFORCANDIDATENO",

    FROM

    WHERE

    ), 
"QUESTIONSCOPEDESCRIPTION15" AS 
    (
    SELECT
        "questionscopedescription"."questionscopeno" AS "QUESTIONSCOPENO", 
        "questionscopedescription"."language" AS "LANGUAGE", 
        "questionscopedescription"."questionscopedesc" AS "QUESTIONSCOPEDESC", 
        "questionscopedescription"."locale" AS "LOCALE"
    FROM
        "taleo"."questionscopedescription" "questionscopedescription" 
    WHERE 
        "questionscopedescription"."language" = 2
    ), 
"FORMATOFQUESTIONDESCRIPTION17" AS 
    (
    SELECT
        "formatofquestiondescription"."formatofquestionno" AS "FORMATOFQUESTIONNO", 
        "formatofquestiondescription"."formatofquestiondesc" AS "FORMATOFQUESTIONDESC"
    FROM
        "taleo"."formatofquestiondescription" 
    WHERE 
        "formatofquestiondescription"."locale" = varchar 'en'
    ), 
"POSSIBLEANSWERDESCRIPTION21" AS 
    (
    SELECT
        "possibleanswerdescription"."possibleanswerno" AS "POSSIBLEANSWERNO", 
        "possibleanswerdescription"."possibleanswer" AS "POSSIBLEANSWER"
    FROM
        "taleo"."possibleanswerdescription" "possibleanswerdescription" 
    WHERE 
        "possibleanswerdescription"."locale" = varchar 'en'
    ), 
"TQ0_Questions_Query" AS 
    (
    SELECT
        "QUESTIONDESCRIPTION__POSSIBLEANSWER_9"."QUESTIONDESC" AS "QUESTIONDESC", 
        "POSSIBLEANSWERDESCRIPTION21"."POSSIBLEANSWER" AS "POSSIBLEANSWER", 
        CASE 
            WHEN 
                CASE "PRESCREENINGFORMPOSSIBLEANSWER5"."isrequired"
                    WHEN 0 THEN varchar 'No'
                    WHEN 1 THEN varchar 'Yes'
                END = varchar 'No'
                THEN
                    varchar '--'
            WHEN 
                CASE "PRESCREENINGFORMPOSSIBLEANSWER5"."isrequired"
                    WHEN 0 THEN varchar 'No'
                    WHEN 1 THEN varchar 'Yes'
                END = varchar 'Yes'
                THEN
                    varchar 'Required'
        END AS "ISREQUIRED", 
        CASE 
            WHEN 
                CASE "PRESCREENINGFORMPOSSIBLEANSWER5"."isasset"
                    WHEN 0 THEN varchar 'No'
                    WHEN 1 THEN varchar 'Yes'
                END = varchar 'No'
                THEN
                    varchar '--'
            WHEN 
                CASE "PRESCREENINGFORMPOSSIBLEANSWER5"."isasset"
                    WHEN 0 THEN varchar 'No'
                    WHEN 1 THEN varchar 'Yes'
                END = varchar 'Yes'
                THEN
                    varchar 'Asset'
        END AS "Asset", 
        COUNT("QUESTIONDESCRIPTION__POSSIBLEANSWER_9"."QUESTIONDESC")
            OVER(
                PARTITION BY
                    "QUESTIONDESCRIPTION__POSSIBLEANSWER_9"."QUESTIONDESC", 
                    "POSSIBLEANSWERDESCRIPTION21"."POSSIBLEANSWER", 
                    CASE 
                        WHEN 
                            CASE "PRESCREENINGFORMPOSSIBLEANSWER5"."isrequired"
                                WHEN 0 THEN varchar 'No'
                                WHEN 1 THEN varchar 'Yes'
                            END = varchar 'No'
                            THEN
                                varchar '--'
                        WHEN 
                            CASE "PRESCREENINGFORMPOSSIBLEANSWER5"."isrequired"
                                WHEN 0 THEN varchar 'No'
                                WHEN 1 THEN varchar 'Yes'
                            END = varchar 'Yes'
                            THEN
                                varchar 'Required'
                    END, 
                    CASE 
                        WHEN 
                            CASE "PRESCREENINGFORMPOSSIBLEANSWER5"."isasset"
                                WHEN 0 THEN varchar 'No'
                                WHEN 1 THEN varchar 'Yes'
                            END = varchar 'No'
                            THEN
                                varchar '--'
                        WHEN 
                            CASE "PRESCREENINGFORMPOSSIBLEANSWER5"."isasset"
                                WHEN 0 THEN varchar 'No'
                                WHEN 1 THEN varchar 'Yes'
                            END = varchar 'Yes'
                            THEN
                                varchar 'Asset'
                    END
                ORDER BY
                    "QUESTIONDESCRIPTION__POSSIBLEANSWER_9"."QUESTIONDESC" ASC, 
                    "POSSIBLEANSWERDESCRIPTION21"."POSSIBLEANSWER" ASC, 
                    CASE 
                        WHEN 
                            CASE "PRESCREENINGFORMPOSSIBLEANSWER5"."isrequired"
                                WHEN 0 THEN varchar 'No'
                                WHEN 1 THEN varchar 'Yes'
                            END = varchar 'No'
                            THEN
                                varchar '--'
                        WHEN 
                            CASE "PRESCREENINGFORMPOSSIBLEANSWER5"."isrequired"
                                WHEN 0 THEN varchar 'No'
                                WHEN 1 THEN varchar 'Yes'
                            END = varchar 'Yes'
                            THEN
                                varchar 'Required'
                    END ASC, 
                    CASE 
                        WHEN 
                            CASE "PRESCREENINGFORMPOSSIBLEANSWER5"."isasset"
                                WHEN 0 THEN varchar 'No'
                                WHEN 1 THEN varchar 'Yes'
                            END = varchar 'No'
                            THEN
                                varchar '--'
                        WHEN 
                            CASE "PRESCREENINGFORMPOSSIBLEANSWER5"."isasset"
                                WHEN 0 THEN varchar 'No'
                                WHEN 1 THEN varchar 'Yes'
                            END = varchar 'Yes'
                            THEN
                                varchar 'Asset'
                    END ASC
             ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
            ) AS "Row_Number0", 
        "QUESTIONSCOPEDESCRIPTION15"."QUESTIONSCOPEDESC" AS "QUESTIONSCOPEDESC", 
        "QUESTION7"."code" AS "CODE", 
        "FORMATOFQUESTIONDESCRIPTION17"."FORMATOFQUESTIONDESC" AS "FORMATOFQUESTIONDESC", 
        "VISIBILITYFORCANDIDATEDESC12"."VISIBILITYFORCANDIDATEDESC" AS "VISIBILITYFORCANDIDATEDESC"
    FROM
        "taleo"."requisition" "REQUISITION0"
            INNER JOIN "JOBINFORMATION2"
            ON "REQUISITION0"."jobinformationno" = "JOBINFORMATION2"."JOBINFORMATIONNO"
                LEFT OUTER JOIN 
                "taleo"."prescreeningformquestion" "PRESCREENINGFORMQUESTION3"
                    INNER JOIN "taleo"."prescreeningformpossibleanswer" "PRESCREENINGFORMPOSSIBLEANSWER5"
                    ON "PRESCREENINGFORMQUESTION3"."prescreeningformquestionno" = "PRESCREENINGFORMPOSSIBLEANSWER5"."prescreeningformquestionno"
                        INNER JOIN "taleo"."question" "QUESTION7"
                        ON "QUESTION7"."questionno" = "PRESCREENINGFORMQUESTION3"."questionno"
                            INNER JOIN "QUESTIONDESCRIPTION__POSSIBLEANSWER_9"
                            ON "QUESTION7"."questionno" = "QUESTIONDESCRIPTION__POSSIBLEANSWER_9"."QUESTIONNO"
                                INNER JOIN "VISIBILITYFORCANDIDATEDESC12"
                                ON "QUESTION7"."visibilityforcandidateno" = "VISIBILITYFORCANDIDATEDESC12"."VISIBILITYFORCANDIDATENO"
                                    INNER JOIN "QUESTIONSCOPEDESCRIPTION15"
                                    ON "QUESTIONSCOPEDESCRIPTION15"."QUESTIONSCOPENO" = "QUESTION7"."questionscopeno"
                                        INNER JOIN "FORMATOFQUESTIONDESCRIPTION17"
                                        ON "QUESTION7"."formatofquestionno" = "FORMATOFQUESTIONDESCRIPTION17"."FORMATOFQUESTIONNO"
                ON "JOBINFORMATION2"."PRESCREENINGFORMNO" = "PRESCREENINGFORMQUESTION3"."prescreeningformno"
                    FULL OUTER JOIN "taleo"."answer" "ANSWER19"
                    ON "ANSWER19"."questionno" = "QUESTION7"."questionno"
                        LEFT OUTER JOIN "POSSIBLEANSWERDESCRIPTION21"
                        ON "ANSWER19"."possibleanswerno" = "POSSIBLEANSWERDESCRIPTION21"."POSSIBLEANSWERNO" 
    WHERE 
        "REQUISITION0"."contestnumber" = ? AND
        NOT ( "JOBINFORMATION2"."JOBINFORMATIONNO" IS NULL ) AND
        NOT ( "QUESTIONDESCRIPTION__POSSIBLEANSWER_9"."QUESTIONDESC" IS NULL )
    ), 
"SQ0_Questions_Query" AS 
    (
    SELECT
        "D1"."C0" AS "QUESTIONDESC", 
        "D1"."C1" AS "Row_Number0", 
        "D1"."C2" AS "POSSIBLEANSWER", 
        "D1"."C3" AS "ISREQUIRED", 
        "D1"."C4" AS "Asset", 
        MIN("D1"."C5") AS "Min1", 
        MIN("D1"."C6") AS "Min11", 
        MIN("D1"."C7") AS "Min12", 
        MIN("D1"."C8") AS "Min13"
    FROM
        (
        SELECT
            "TQ0_Questions_Query"."QUESTIONDESC" AS "C0", 
            MIN("TQ0_Questions_Query"."Row_Number0")
                OVER(
                    PARTITION BY
                        "TQ0_Questions_Query"."QUESTIONDESC", 
                        "TQ0_Questions_Query"."POSSIBLEANSWER", 
                        "TQ0_Questions_Query"."ISREQUIRED", 
                        "TQ0_Questions_Query"."Asset"
                ) AS "C1", 
            "TQ0_Questions_Query"."POSSIBLEANSWER" AS "C2", 
            "TQ0_Questions_Query"."ISREQUIRED" AS "C3", 
            "TQ0_Questions_Query"."Asset" AS "C4", 
            "TQ0_Questions_Query"."QUESTIONSCOPEDESC" AS "C5", 
            "TQ0_Questions_Query"."CODE" AS "C6", 
            "TQ0_Questions_Query"."FORMATOFQUESTIONDESC" AS "C7", 
            "TQ0_Questions_Query"."VISIBILITYFORCANDIDATEDESC" AS "C8"
        FROM
            "TQ0_Questions_Query"
        ) "D1" 
    GROUP BY 
        "D1"."C0", 
        "D1"."C1", 
        "D1"."C2", 
        "D1"."C3", 
        "D1"."C4"
    )
SELECT
    "SQ0_Questions_Query"."QUESTIONDESC" AS "QUESTIONDESC", 
    "SQ0_Questions_Query"."Row_Number0" AS "Row_Number0", 
    MIN("SQ0_Questions_Query"."Min1")
        OVER(
            PARTITION BY
                "SQ0_Questions_Query"."QUESTIONDESC"
        ) AS "QUESTIONSCOPEDESC", 
    MIN("SQ0_Questions_Query"."Min11")
        OVER(
            PARTITION BY
                "SQ0_Questions_Query"."QUESTIONDESC"
        ) AS "CODE", 
    MIN("SQ0_Questions_Query"."Min12")
        OVER(
            PARTITION BY
                "SQ0_Questions_Query"."QUESTIONDESC"
        ) AS "FORMATOFQUESTIONDESC", 
    MIN("SQ0_Questions_Query"."Min13")
        OVER(
            PARTITION BY
                "SQ0_Questions_Query"."QUESTIONDESC"
        ) AS "VISIBILITYFORCANDIDATEDESC", 
    "SQ0_Questions_Query"."POSSIBLEANSWER" AS "POSSIBLEANSWER", 
    "SQ0_Questions_Query"."ISREQUIRED" AS "ISREQUIRED", 
    "SQ0_Questions_Query"."Asset" AS "Asset"
FROM
    "SQ0_Questions_Query" 
ORDER BY 
    "QUESTIONDESC" ASC NULLS LAST, 
    "POSSIBLEANSWER" ASC NULLS LAST, 
    "ISREQUIRED" ASC NULLS LAST, 
    "Asset" ASC NULLS LAST

Query:
WITH 
"OLFLOCATION__Disqualifier_" AS 
    (
    SELECT
        "olflocation"."olflocationno" AS "OLFLOCATIONNO", 
        "olflocation"."externallocationno" AS "EXTERNALLOCATIONNO", 
        "olflocation"."vpdid" AS "VPDID", 
        "olflocation"."parentolflocationno" AS "PARENTOLFLOCATIONNO", 
        "olflocation"."olfrslocationno" AS "OLFRSLOCATIONNO", 
        "olflocation"."abbreviation" AS "ABBREVIATION", 
        "olflocation"."zipcode" AS "ZIPCODE", 
        "olflocation"."customerid" AS "CUSTOMERID", 
        "olflocation"."code" AS "CODE", 
        "olflocation"."iscomplete" AS "ISCOMPLETE", 
        "olflocation"."rowcreationdate" AS "ROWCREATIONDATE", 
        "olflocation"."rowlastmodifieddate" AS "ROWLASTMODIFIEDDATE", 
        "olflocation"."akxadminentitystatusno" AS "AKXADMINENTITYSTATUSNO", 
        "olflocation"."lastmodifiedon" AS "LASTMODIFIEDON", 
        "olflocation"."latitude" AS "LATITUDE", 
        "olflocation"."longitude" AS "LONGITUDE", 
        "olflocation"."geocodinglastupdate" AS "GEOCODINGLASTUPDATE", 
        "olflocation"."geocodingdataused" AS "GEOCODINGDATAUSED", 
        "olflocation"."workerlocationaddress" AS "WORKERLOCATIONADDRESS", 
        "olflocation"."isworkerlocation" AS "ISWORKERLOCATION"
    FROM
        "taleo"."olflocation"
    ), 
"LOCATIONQUESTION5" AS 
    (
    SELECT
        "locationquestion"."locationno" AS "LOCATIONNO", 
        "locationquestion"."questionno" AS "QUESTIONNO", 
        "locationquestion"."isinprofiler" AS "ISINPROFILER", 
        "locationquestion"."profilerdisplayseq" AS "PROFILERDISPLAYSEQ", 
        "locationquestion"."isinmodel" AS "ISINMODEL", 
        "locationquestion"."modeldisplayseq" AS "MODELDISPLAYSEQ", 
        "locationquestion"."locationquestionno" AS "LOCATIONQUESTIONNO"
    FROM
        "taleo"."locationquestion"
    ), 
"QUESTION_Disqualifier_6" AS 
    (
    SELECT
        "question"."questionno" AS "QUESTIONNO", 
        "question"."formatofquestionno" AS "FORMATOFQUESTIONNO", 
        "question"."questionscopeno" AS "QUESTIONSCOPENO", 
        "question"."visibilityforcandidateno" AS "VISIBILITYFORCANDIDATENO", 
        "question"."code" AS "CODE"
    FROM
        "taleo"."question" "question" 
    WHERE 
        "question"."typeofquestionno" = 3
    ), 
"FORMATOFQUESTIONDESCRIPTION_Disqualifier_9" AS 
    (
    SELECT
        "formatofquestiondescription"."formatofquestionno" AS "FORMATOFQUESTIONNO", 
        "formatofquestiondescription"."formatofquestiondesc" AS "FORMATOFQUESTIONDESC"
    FROM
        "taleo"."formatofquestiondescription" 
    WHERE 
        "formatofquestiondescription"."locale" = varchar 'en'
    ), 
"QUESTIONDESCRIPTION_Disqualifier_11" AS 
    (
    SELECT
        "questiondescription"."questionno" AS "QUESTIONNO", 
        "questiondescription"."questiondesc" AS "QUESTIONDESC", 
        "questiondescription"."explanationintro" AS "EXPLANATIONINTRO"
    FROM
        "taleo"."questiondescription" "questiondescription" 
    WHERE 
        "questiondescription"."locale" = varchar 'en'
    ), 
"VISIBILITYFORCANDIDATEDESC_Disqualifier_14" AS 
    (
    SELECT
        "visibilityforcandidatedesc"."visibilityforcandidateno" AS "VISIBILITYFORCANDIDATENO", 
        "visibilityforcandidatedesc"."visibilityforcandidatedesc" AS "VISIBILITYFORCANDIDATEDESC"
    FROM
        "taleo"."visibilityforcandidatedesc" "visibilityforcandidatedesc" 
    WHERE 
        "visibilityforcandidatedesc"."locale" = varchar 'en'
    ), 
"QUESTIONSCOPEDESCRIPTION_Disqualifier_" AS 
    (
    SELECT
        "questionscopedescription"."questionscopeno" AS "QUESTIONSCOPENO", 
        "questionscopedescription"."language" AS "LANGUAGE", 
        "questionscopedescription"."questionscopedesc" AS "QUESTIONSCOPEDESC", 
        "questionscopedescription"."locale" AS "LOCALE"
    FROM
        "taleo"."questionscopedescription" "questionscopedescription" 
    WHERE 
        "questionscopedescription"."language" = 2
    ), 
"ANSWER_Disqualifier_" AS 
    (
    SELECT
        "answer"."answerno" AS "ANSWERNO", 
        "answer"."candidateno" AS "CANDIDATENO", 
        "answer"."questionno" AS "QUESTIONNO", 
        "answer"."possibleanswerno" AS "POSSIBLEANSWERNO", 
        "answer"."explanation" AS "EXPLANATION", 
        "answer"."infofeederno" AS "INFOFEEDERNO", 
        "answer"."disqualifierresultno" AS "DISQUALIFIERRESULTNO", 
        "answer"."creationdate" AS "CREATIONDATE"
    FROM
        "taleo"."answer"
    ), 
"DISQUALIFIERRESULTDESCRIPTION_Disqualifier_20" AS 
    (
    SELECT
        "disqualifierresultdescription"."disqualifierresultno" AS "DISQUALIFIERRESULTNO", 
        "disqualifierresultdescription"."disqualifierresultdesc" AS "DISQUALIFIERRESULTDESC"
    FROM
        "taleo"."disqualifierresultdescription" 
    WHERE 
        "disqualifierresultdescription"."locale" = varchar 'en'
    ), 
"POSSIBLEANSWERDESCRIPTION_Disqualifier_22" AS 
    (
    SELECT
        "possibleanswerdescription"."possibleanswerno" AS "POSSIBLEANSWERNO", 
        "possibleanswerdescription"."possibleanswer" AS "POSSIBLEANSWER"
    FROM
        "taleo"."possibleanswerdescription" "possibleanswerdescription" 
    WHERE 
        "possibleanswerdescription"."locale" = varchar 'en'
    ), 
"TQ0_Questionnaire_Query" AS 
    (
    SELECT
        "QUESTIONDESCRIPTION_Disqualifier_11"."QUESTIONDESC" AS "QUESTIONDESC", 
        "POSSIBLEANSWERDESCRIPTION_Disqualifier_22"."POSSIBLEANSWER" AS "POSSIBLEANSWER", 
        "DISQUALIFIERRESULTDESCRIPTION_Disqualifier_20"."DISQUALIFIERRESULTDESC" AS "DISQUALIFIERRESULTDESC", 
        COUNT("QUESTIONDESCRIPTION_Disqualifier_11"."QUESTIONDESC")
            OVER(
                PARTITION BY
                    "QUESTIONDESCRIPTION_Disqualifier_11"."QUESTIONDESC", 
                    "POSSIBLEANSWERDESCRIPTION_Disqualifier_22"."POSSIBLEANSWER", 
                    "DISQUALIFIERRESULTDESCRIPTION_Disqualifier_20"."DISQUALIFIERRESULTDESC"
                ORDER BY
                    "QUESTIONDESCRIPTION_Disqualifier_11"."QUESTIONDESC" ASC, 
                    "POSSIBLEANSWERDESCRIPTION_Disqualifier_22"."POSSIBLEANSWER" ASC, 
                    "DISQUALIFIERRESULTDESCRIPTION_Disqualifier_20"."DISQUALIFIERRESULTDESC" ASC
             ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
            ) AS "Row_Number0", 
        "QUESTIONSCOPEDESCRIPTION_Disqualifier_"."QUESTIONSCOPEDESC" AS "QUESTIONSCOPEDESC", 
        "QUESTION_Disqualifier_6"."CODE" AS "CODE", 
        "FORMATOFQUESTIONDESCRIPTION_Disqualifier_9"."FORMATOFQUESTIONDESC" AS "FORMATOFQUESTIONDESC", 
        "VISIBILITYFORCANDIDATEDESC_Disqualifier_14"."VISIBILITYFORCANDIDATEDESC" AS "VISIBILITYFORCANDIDATEDESC", 
        "QUESTIONDESCRIPTION_Disqualifier_11"."EXPLANATIONINTRO" AS "EXPLANATIONINTRO"
    FROM
        "taleo"."requisition" "REQUISITION0"
            LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."requisitionlocation" "REQUISITIONLOCATION__Disqualifier_"
            ON "REQUISITIONLOCATION__Disqualifier_"."requisitionno" = "REQUISITION0"."requisitionno"
                LEFT OUTER JOIN 
                "OLFLOCATION__Disqualifier_"
                    INNER JOIN "taleo"."olflocationdescopti" "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__Disqualifier_"
                    ON "OLFLOCATION__Disqualifier_"."OLFLOCATIONNO" = "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__Disqualifier_"."olflocationno"
                ON "REQUISITIONLOCATION__Disqualifier_"."olflocationno" = "OLFLOCATION__Disqualifier_"."OLFLOCATIONNO"
                    LEFT OUTER JOIN "LOCATIONQUESTION5"
                    ON "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__Disqualifier_"."olflocationno2" = "LOCATIONQUESTION5"."LOCATIONNO"
                        LEFT OUTER JOIN 
                        "QUESTION_Disqualifier_6"
                            INNER JOIN "FORMATOFQUESTIONDESCRIPTION_Disqualifier_9"
                            ON "QUESTION_Disqualifier_6"."FORMATOFQUESTIONNO" = "FORMATOFQUESTIONDESCRIPTION_Disqualifier_9"."FORMATOFQUESTIONNO"
                                INNER JOIN "QUESTIONDESCRIPTION_Disqualifier_11"
                                ON "QUESTION_Disqualifier_6"."QUESTIONNO" = "QUESTIONDESCRIPTION_Disqualifier_11"."QUESTIONNO"
                                    INNER JOIN "VISIBILITYFORCANDIDATEDESC_Disqualifier_14"
                                    ON "QUESTION_Disqualifier_6"."VISIBILITYFORCANDIDATENO" = "VISIBILITYFORCANDIDATEDESC_Disqualifier_14"."VISIBILITYFORCANDIDATENO"
                                        INNER JOIN "QUESTIONSCOPEDESCRIPTION_Disqualifier_"
                                        ON "QUESTIONSCOPEDESCRIPTION_Disqualifier_"."QUESTIONSCOPENO" = "QUESTION_Disqualifier_6"."QUESTIONSCOPENO"
                        ON "LOCATIONQUESTION5"."QUESTIONNO" = "QUESTION_Disqualifier_6"."QUESTIONNO"
                            LEFT OUTER JOIN 
                            "ANSWER_Disqualifier_"
                                INNER JOIN "DISQUALIFIERRESULTDESCRIPTION_Disqualifier_20"
                                ON "ANSWER_Disqualifier_"."DISQUALIFIERRESULTNO" = "DISQUALIFIERRESULTDESCRIPTION_Disqualifier_20"."DISQUALIFIERRESULTNO"
                            ON "ANSWER_Disqualifier_"."QUESTIONNO" = "QUESTION_Disqualifier_6"."QUESTIONNO"
                                LEFT OUTER JOIN "POSSIBLEANSWERDESCRIPTION_Disqualifier_22"
                                ON "POSSIBLEANSWERDESCRIPTION_Disqualifier_22"."POSSIBLEANSWERNO" = "ANSWER_Disqualifier_"."POSSIBLEANSWERNO" 
    WHERE 
        "REQUISITION0"."contestnumber" = ? AND
        NOT ( "QUESTIONDESCRIPTION_Disqualifier_11"."QUESTIONDESC" IS NULL )
    ), 
"SQ0_Questionnaire_Query" AS 
    (
    SELECT
        "D1"."C0" AS "QUESTIONDESC", 
        "D1"."C1" AS "Row_Number0", 
        "D1"."C2" AS "POSSIBLEANSWER", 
        "D1"."C3" AS "DISQUALIFIERRESULTDESC", 
        MIN("D1"."C4") AS "Min1", 
        MIN("D1"."C5") AS "Min11", 
        MIN("D1"."C6") AS "Min12", 
        MIN("D1"."C7") AS "Min13", 
        MIN("D1"."C8") AS "Min14"
    FROM
        (
        SELECT
            "TQ0_Questionnaire_Query"."QUESTIONDESC" AS "C0", 
            MIN("TQ0_Questionnaire_Query"."Row_Number0")
                OVER(
                    PARTITION BY
                        "TQ0_Questionnaire_Query"."QUESTIONDESC", 
                        "TQ0_Questionnaire_Query"."POSSIBLEANSWER", 
                        "TQ0_Questionnaire_Query"."DISQUALIFIERRESULTDESC"
                ) AS "C1", 
            "TQ0_Questionnaire_Query"."POSSIBLEANSWER" AS "C2", 
            "TQ0_Questionnaire_Query"."DISQUALIFIERRESULTDESC" AS "C3", 
            "TQ0_Questionnaire_Query"."QUESTIONSCOPEDESC" AS "C4", 
            "TQ0_Questionnaire_Query"."CODE" AS "C5", 
            "TQ0_Questionnaire_Query"."FORMATOFQUESTIONDESC" AS "C6", 
            "TQ0_Questionnaire_Query"."VISIBILITYFORCANDIDATEDESC" AS "C7", 
            "TQ0_Questionnaire_Query"."EXPLANATIONINTRO" AS "C8"
        FROM
            "TQ0_Questionnaire_Query"
        ) "D1" 
    GROUP BY 
        "D1"."C0", 
        "D1"."C1", 
        "D1"."C2", 
        "D1"."C3"
    )
SELECT
    "SQ0_Questionnaire_Query"."QUESTIONDESC" AS "QUESTIONDESC", 
    "SQ0_Questionnaire_Query"."Row_Number0" AS "Row_Number0", 
    MIN("SQ0_Questionnaire_Query"."Min1")
        OVER(
            PARTITION BY
                "SQ0_Questionnaire_Query"."QUESTIONDESC"
        ) AS "QUESTIONSCOPEDESC", 
    MIN("SQ0_Questionnaire_Query"."Min11")
        OVER(
            PARTITION BY
                "SQ0_Questionnaire_Query"."QUESTIONDESC"
        ) AS "Code", 
    MIN("SQ0_Questionnaire_Query"."Min12")
        OVER(
            PARTITION BY
                "SQ0_Questionnaire_Query"."QUESTIONDESC"
        ) AS "FORMATOFQUESTIONDESC", 
    MIN("SQ0_Questionnaire_Query"."Min13")
        OVER(
            PARTITION BY
                "SQ0_Questionnaire_Query"."QUESTIONDESC"
        ) AS "VISIBILITYFORCANDIDATEDESC", 
    MIN("SQ0_Questionnaire_Query"."Min14")
        OVER(
            PARTITION BY
                "SQ0_Questionnaire_Query"."QUESTIONDESC"
        ) AS "EXPLANATIONINTRO", 
    "SQ0_Questionnaire_Query"."POSSIBLEANSWER" AS "POSSIBLEANSWER", 
    "SQ0_Questionnaire_Query"."DISQUALIFIERRESULTDESC" AS "DISQUALIFIERRESULTDESC"
FROM
    "SQ0_Questionnaire_Query" 
ORDER BY 
    "QUESTIONDESC" ASC NULLS LAST, 
    "POSSIBLEANSWER" ASC NULLS LAST, 
    "DISQUALIFIERRESULTDESC" ASC NULLS LAST
