Query:
WITH 
"jobinformation0" AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM "taleo"."jobinformation"
), 
"argroupdescription1" AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM "taleo"."argroupdescription"
), 
"aruser_recrtowneroperno_" AS (
    SELECT *,
	        "aruser"."aruserno" AS "ARUSERNO"

    FROM "taleo"."aruser"
), 
"jobinformationdescription11" AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM "taleo"."jobinformationdescription"
), 
"jobinformationudfreport12" AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM "taleo"."jobinformationudfreport"
), 
"aruser_contactemail_" AS (
    SELECT *,
	        "aruser"."aruserno" AS "ARUSERNO"

    FROM "taleo"."aruser"
), 
"aruser_contactname_" AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM "taleo"."aruser"
), 
"aruser_hiringmgrno_" AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM "taleo"."aruser"
), 
"aruser_recrtasstno_" AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM "taleo"."aruser"
), 
"sq0_main_query" AS (
    SELECT
        "requisition8"."contestnumber" AS "requisition_id", 
        MIN("ps_reqstat_jdo"."req_status") AS "min1", 
        MIN(TRIM(BOTH FROM ((((NVL("aruser_recrtowneroperno_"."lastname", varchar ' ') || varchar ', ') || NVL("aruser_recrtowneroperno_"."firstname", varchar ' ')) || varchar ' ') || NVL("aruser_recrtowneroperno_"."middleinitial", varchar ' ')))) AS "min11", 
        MIN("ps_department_jdo"."departmentname") AS "min12", 
        MIN("ps_reqstat_jdo"."req_status_details") AS "min13", 
        MIN(TRIM(BOTH FROM ((((NVL("aruser_hiringmgrno_"."lastname", varchar ' ') || varchar ', ') || NVL("aruser_hiringmgrno_"."firstname", varchar ' ')) || varchar ' ') || NVL("aruser_hiringmgrno_"."middleinitial", varchar ' ')))) AS "min14", 
        MIN("ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cgps_jobtitle") AS "min15", 
        MIN("ps_candofr_jdo_requisition_"."cgps_jobcode") AS "min16", 
        MIN("ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_psbandreq") AS "min17", 
        MIN("ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_postingtype") AS "min18", 
        MIN((("jobinformationudfreport12"."udscode15" || varchar ' - ') || "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_reqexpensectr")) AS "min19", 
        MIN("ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_business_line") AS "min110", 
        MIN((("ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cgps_eeocateg_code" || varchar ' - ') || "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cgps_eeocateg")) AS "min111", 
        MIN((("ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cgps_eeogroup_code" || varchar ' - ') || "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cgps_eeogroup")) AS "min112", 
        MIN(
            CASE 
                WHEN "argroupdescription1"."locale" = varchar 'en' THEN "argroupdescription1"."namedescription"
            END
        ) AS "min113", 
        MIN("olfjobfielddescopti__requisition_"."name1") AS "min114", 
        MIN("olfjobfielddescopti__requisition_"."name2") AS "min115", 
        MIN(
            CASE 
                WHEN "aruser_recrtasstno_"."lastname" IS NULL THEN NULL
                ELSE TRIM(BOTH FROM ((((NVL("aruser_recrtasstno_"."lastname", varchar ' ') || varchar ', ') || NVL("aruser_recrtasstno_"."firstname", varchar ' ')) || varchar ' ') || NVL("aruser_recrtasstno_"."middleinitial", varchar ' ')))
            END
        ) AS "min116", 
        MIN("ps_cswworkflow_jdo"."cswworkflowname") AS "min117", 
        MIN("ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_employeeclass") AS "min118", 
        MIN(
            CASE 
                WHEN "rsemployeestatusdescription2"."language" = 2 THEN "rsemployeestatusdescription2"."rsemployeestatusdesc"
            END
        ) AS "min119", 
        MIN(
            CASE 
                WHEN "rsjobshiftdescription6"."language" = 2 THEN "rsjobshiftdescription6"."rsjobshiftdesc"
            END
        ) AS "min120", 
        MIN(
            CASE 
                WHEN "rsjobscheduledescription4"."language" = 8 THEN "rsjobscheduledescription4"."rsjobscheduledesc"
            END
        ) AS "min121", 
        MIN("ps_candofr_jdo_requisition_"."cg_standardhrs") AS "min122", 
        MIN("ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_fte") AS "min123", 
        MIN("ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_competency_list") AS "min124", 
        MIN("jobinformationdescription11"."externaldescription") AS "min125", 
        MIN("jobinformationdescription11"."externalqualification") AS "min126", 
        MIN(TRIM(BOTH FROM ((((NVL("aruser_contactname_"."lastname", varchar ' ') || varchar ', ') || NVL("aruser_contactname_"."firstname", varchar ' ')) || varchar ' ') || NVL("aruser_contactname_"."middleinitial", varchar ' ')))) AS "min127", 
        MIN("aruser_contactemail_"."correspondenceemail") AS "min128", 
        MIN("jobinformationdescription11"."internaldescription") AS "min129", 
        MIN("jobinformationdescription11"."internalqualification") AS "min130"
    FROM
        "jobinformation0"
        INNER JOIN "argroupdescription1" ON "jobinformation0"."groupno" = "argroupdescription1"."argroupno"
        INNER JOIN "taleo"."ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo" "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"
            ON "jobinformation0"."jobinformationno" = "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."jobinformationno"
        INNER JOIN "taleo"."rsemployeestatusdescription" "rsemployeestatusdescription2"
            ON "jobinformation0"."employeestatusno" = "rsemployeestatusdescription2"."rsemployeestatusno"
        INNER JOIN "taleo"."rsjobscheduledescription" "rsjobscheduledescription4"
            ON "jobinformation0"."jobscheduleno" = "rsjobscheduledescription4"."rsjobscheduleno"
        INNER JOIN "taleo"."rsjobshiftdescription" "rsjobshiftdescription6"
            ON "jobinformation0"."jobshiftno" = "rsjobshiftdescription6"."rsjobshiftno"
        INNER JOIN "taleo"."requisition" "requisition8"
            ON "requisition8"."jobinformationno" = "jobinformation0"."jobinformationno"
        LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."ps_candofr_jdo" "ps_candofr_jdo_requisition_"
            ON "jobinformation0"."offerno" = "ps_candofr_jdo_requisition_"."offerno"
        LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."olfjobfielddescopti" "olfjobfielddescopti__requisition_"
            ON "requisition8"."olfjobfieldno" = "olfjobfielddescopti__requisition_"."olfjobfieldno"
        LEFT OUTER JOIN "aruser_recrtowneroperno_"
            ON "jobinformation0"."recruiterowneroperatorno" = "aruser_recrtowneroperno_"."ARUSERNO"
        LEFT OUTER JOIN "jobinformationdescription11"
            ON "jobinformation0"."jobinformationno" = "jobinformationdescription11"."jobinformationno"
        LEFT OUTER JOIN "jobinformationudfreport12"
            ON "jobinformation0"."jobinformationno" = "jobinformationudfreport12"."jobinformationno"
        LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."ps_cswworkflow_jdo" "ps_cswworkflow_jdo"
            ON "jobinformation0"."cswworkflowno" = "ps_cswworkflow_jdo"."cswworkflowno"
        LEFT OUTER JOIN "aruser_contactemail_"
            ON "requisition8"."contactemailintno" = "aruser_contactemail_".ARUSERNO
        LEFT OUTER JOIN "aruser_contactname_"
            ON "requisition8"."contactnameintno" = "aruser_contactname_"."aruserno"
        LEFT OUTER JOIN "aruser_hiringmgrno_"
            ON "requisition8"."hiringmanagerno" = "aruser_hiringmgrno_"."aruserno"
        LEFT OUTER JOIN "aruser_recrtasstno_"
            ON "requisition8"."recruiterassistantno" = "aruser_recrtasstno_"."aruserno"
        LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."ps_department_jdo" "ps_department_jdo"
            ON "requisition8"."departmentno" = "ps_department_jdo"."departmentno"
        LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."ps_reqstat_jdo" "ps_reqstat_jdo"
            ON "requisition8"."contestnumber" = "ps_reqstat_jdo"."req_no"
    WHERE 
        "requisition8"."contestnumber" = ?
    GROUP BY 
        "requisition8"."contestnumber"
)
SELECT
    "sq0_main_query"."requisition_id" AS "requisition_id", 
    MIN("sq0_main_query"."min1") OVER(PARTITION BY "sq0_main_query"."requisition_id") AS "req_status", 
    MIN("sq0_main_query"."min11") OVER(PARTITION BY "sq0_main_query"."requisition_id") AS "recruiter_owner_name",

    MIN("sq0_main_query"."min111") OVER(PARTITION BY "sq0_main_query"."requisition_id") AS "cgps_eeocateg", 
    MIN("sq0_main_query"."min112") OVER(PARTITION BY "sq0_main_query"."requisition_id") AS "cgps_eeogroup",

    MIN("sq0_main_query"."min125") OVER(PARTITION BY "sq0_main_query"."requisition_id") AS "externaldescription", 
    MIN("sq0_main_query"."min126") OVER(PARTITION BY "sq0_main_query"."requisition_id") AS "externalqualification", 
    MIN("sq0_main_query"."min127") OVER(PARTITION BY "sq0_main_query"."requisition_id") AS "contact_name",

    MIN("sq0_main_query"."min129") OVER(PARTITION BY "sq0_main_query"."requisition_id") AS "internaldescription", 
    MIN("sq0_main_query"."min130") OVER(PARTITION BY "sq0_main_query"."requisition_id") AS "internalqualification"
FROM
